clientMessages.author: davi_dinicio
clientMessages.content:
🚨 ACTION REQUIRED: Monday Check-in & Campaign Audit 🚨

Hi <@835366914469396500>, Happy Monday!

I was just reviewing your active campaign this morning. So far, we've generated 18 leads at $36.40 per lead, with about $655 spent. The front-end metrics look really healthy, but to me, the only metric that truly matters is what's happening on your end.

**I’m reaching out for our weekly check-in, but today I want to approach things a bit differently. We are dedicating this week to heavily optimizing and prioritizing your account**, and I need your direct help to make sure we are on the right track.

A general "things are good" update is fine for a regular week, but right now, I really need to dig deeper. I rely entirely on specific feedback from your front lines to know if the system is bringing in the right kind of people.

Could you please take a moment today to provide a detailed breakdown of those 18 leads? Specifically, I need to know:

The Wins: How many of those 18 leads have turned into appointments, quotes, or closed deals?

The Losses: For the ones that didn't move forward, exactly why? (e.g., couldn't reach them after 3 tries, price was too high, wrong timeline, outside your service area).

This exact data is the only way I can adjust the algorithm, weed out any tire-kickers, and make sure those $36 leads are actually highly qualified buyers.

Let me know as soon as you have that breakdown ready to send over. Let’s make this a highly productive week!

clientMessages.author: zack9512.
clientMessages.content: Hi <@662447424132087809> yes would you like to schedule a call and we can go over everything? I’m available today I don’t know how your schedule looks like

clientMessages.author: zack9512.
clientMessages.content: <@662447424132087809> so out of all the leads you were able to bring in I got a few maybes because of price some people waiting on their tax returns but I did get one definite yes just waiting on contract signed and deposit but there is also other appointments I still have to go too also a few people canceled their appointments as well  also have to follow up with a couple as well to see if there ready to go or not but as of right now I have basically have 1 on the schedule

clientMessages.author: davi_dinicio
clientMessages.content: Hi <@835366914469396500>, great work on securing that definite yes! Even with the cancellations, having a pipeline of 'maybes', upcoming appointments, and follow-ups means there's still a lot of potential there. I'd love to schedule a call to review the numbers and see how we can optimize things

clientMessages.author: davi_dinicio
clientMessages.content: But even this feedback already helps a lot in improving the campaign, so I’ll keep you updated with any changes.
